## Nvidia, AMD, Micron, and SK Hynix decline simultaneously amid AI trade pullback

Simultaneous weakness across the full AI chip stack — GPU and memory — signals a sentiment-level re-rating of the AI trade rather than a company-specific issue; the stated catalyst matters critically to determining whether this is a mean-reversion opportunity or a structural de-rating.

- All four major chip names — NVDA, AMD, MU, and SK Hynix — are lower in the same session.
- Coverage offers an explanation for the AI trade pullback driving the move.
- The selloff is broad-based across both GPU and memory segments of the semiconductor sector.
- Cross-asset risk-off in semiconductors is the dominant framing.
